basedOn: smartcopilot.cfg by Birdy.dma for Zibo 3.40.19 / XP 11.41
_comment: Generated from Birdy.dma smartcopilot.cfg (Zibo 3.40.19 / XP 11.41). TRIGGERS+RADIO+SLOW -> onchange datarefs; parking brake + trim from CONTINUED -> continuous (physics-master-only) datarefs; COMMANDS -> commands with hold (begin/end) relay. autoSync OFF: DataRefs.txt discovery duplicated Zibo custom state via sim/ mirrors and caused knob jitter/rollback; this list is the complete community-tested set.
